metadata.summary: Run a shell command in the workspace and embed its stdout into the rendered context. Use for dynamic facts: git status, docker ps, system info. REQUIRES allow_query_shell=true and PERSEUS_ALLOW_DANGEROUS=1. Destructive — executes arbitrary commands with the user's permissions.

Include and render another Perseus source file, recursively resolving its directives. Use to compose context from multiple files or share common sections across workspaces. Bound a growing file with last=N (final N lines) or since=14d/2w/24h (recent dated sections only). Read-only; resolved directives inherit the parent configuration.

injection_boundary: Inline resolver output (@query/@agent stdout) is inserted literally and NOT re-parsed as directives; recursion occurs only through @include via render_source with an incremented depth and immutable ancestor (path+inode) chain.
note: Multi-level @include chain resolves in dependency order, terminates under cycle detection (path+inode) and a configurable depth bound. Byte-reproducible; offline; zero model calls.
